arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham: 'I felt like England's scapegoat at Euro 2024'
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of Real Madrid’s crunch Champions League clash against Liverpool, Bellingham told reporters (as per The Athletic ): “I’ve got to be honest, I think I lost my smile a lot after the Euros when it came to playing for England. Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham has admitted he “felt a bit like the scapegoat” for England’s failure to win the 2024 European Championship this summer.

arts.ttl: I scored the winner for Liverpool v Real Madrid in 1981 European Cup final - here's what I think about Arne Slot's side
Courtois: “Liverpool will be really up for this”
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois also had a good idea of what’s in store - Liverpool pounded his goal in the 2022 final in Paris firing 24 shots at him. Since the memorable Last 16 clash of 2008/9, Liverpool and Real Madrid have met three times in the group stage or knockout round and twice in the final.

arts.ttl: Real boss Carlo Ancelotti not interested in Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer talk
arts.sum: The right-back is out of contract in the summer.

arts.ttl: I felt like the scapegoat after the Euros – Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: Bellingham believes he was harshly criticised as England reached the final before losing to Spain.
Liverpool's 2024/25 squad has been ranked ahead of the January transfer window, and very few players could face uncertain futures.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham claims he was made "scapegoat" for England's Euro 2024 failure
arts.sum: England struggled their way to the Euro 2024 final with Jude Bellingham playing a key role in Gareth Southgate's side before defeat to Spain in the final - but the Real Madrid star feels he has taken the flak

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso drops unexpected contract remark just weeks after emotional Liverpool return
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen have six players sidelined through injury for their first Champions League match since the side Xabi Alonso coaches lost 4-0 to Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Premier League table without Mo Salah's heroics - with Liverpool in 13th and surprising leader
arts.sum: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah has more goal involvements than any other player in the Premier League this season and the numbers lay bare his importance to his club

arts.ttl: “There are too many games” – Carlo Ancelotti echoes Vinicius Junior sentiments after injury
arts.sum: Real Madrid received a major blow earlier this week when it was confirmed that Vinicius Junior had suffered an injury during Sunday’s victory over Leganes. He will miss Wednesday’s Champions League showdown against Liverpool, and his overall time on the sidelines is expected to be 2-3 weeks.
